expectations.text: A config.yaml was created under projects/website-redesign/ with the correct plan_id and group_id
expectations.evidence: Baseline agent found existing config.yaml (created by with_skill agent — contamination issue; not independently created)

expectations.text: The agent conducted an interview asking about scope, goals, milestones, risks, and stakeholders before writing documents
expectations.evidence: No interview step. Agent inferred content from existing files rather than asking the user

expectations.text: At least 10 of 15 documents were created with real content (not just empty stubs)
expectations.evidence: 12 docs created by inference — but based on files already present from with_skill run (contamination)

expectations.text: The project was registered in projects/index.yaml
expectations.evidence: index.yaml updated — but found existing entries from with_skill run

expectations.text: A connection validation step was attempted (tasks list or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: No connection validation step taken in baseline run
